target: Karoui (2026), arXiv:2602.16089 — skew-Hadamard matrix of order 1252
reading: Independent exact-arithmetic verification of the bordered skew-Hadamard difference family {D0,D1} over GF(5^4) (cyclotomic classes of order 16) underlying Karoui's order-1252 skew-Hadamard matrix: D0 is skew and the ±1 autocorrelations sum to -2 for all nonzero w, so a skew-Hadamard matrix of order 1252 exists by Goethals-Seidel — confirming the construction that fills the reported-missing order. Verification-amplification (audit tier); no trust surface.
